EFQueryLens.Extension.Description: Preview EF Core LINQ SQL in Visual Studio using the QueryLens language server.
EFQueryLens.Settings.Category.Descriptio: Settings for QueryLens SQL CodeLens behavior in C# files.
EFQueryLens.Settings.MaxCodeLensPerDocum: Maximum number of SQL Preview CodeLens entries shown per document.
EFQueryLens.Settings.CodeLensDebounceMil: Cache/debounce window in milliseconds before recomputing CodeLens for unchanged content.
EFQueryLens.Settings.UseModelFilter.Desc: When enabled, only show SQL CodeLens for queries rooted at DbSet properties discovered from the model.
EFQueryLens.Settings.EnableVerboseLogs.D: Write QueryLens startup, initialization, and error diagnostics to logs for troubleshooting.
